---
title: "History of the Universities’ Mission to Central Africa 1859-1896, The  By A.E.M. Anderson-Morshead.  With a Preface by Charlotte Mary Yonge."
---

## History of the Universities’ Mission to Central Africa 1859-1896, The  By A.E.M. Anderson-Morshead.  With a Preface by Charlotte Mary Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1897
**Genre:** Non-fiction: preface
**Format:** Preface to book

**Publisher:** London: The Universities’ Mission to Central Africa.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
